expectations.text: Listed or described ECS tasks for the celery service to check running status
expectations.evidence: Listed and described ECS task, confirmed 1/1 running, no crashes

expectations.text: Looked at recent ECS service events for crashes, restarts, or deployment issues
expectations.evidence: Checked service events, noted steady state since morning, one redeployment on Mar 15

expectations.text: Tailed or searched recent celery CloudWatch logs
expectations.evidence: Searched celery logs, found FFmpeg stall errors and S3 NoSuchKey warnings

expectations.text: Queried database for PROCESSING runs that may be stuck
expectations.evidence: Queried all recent pipeline runs, found all 10 failed, none stuck in PROCESSING

expectations.text: Gave a clear health assessment with specific findings
expectations.evidence: Clear verdict: worker healthy, real issue is FFmpeg stall on clip 3 vertical encoding. 3/4 clips completed.
